chosen.headline: Nifty IT jumps ~3%, leads rebound after four-day slide

story.headline: Nifty IT jumps ~3%, leads rebound after four-day slide
story.what_happened: The Nifty IT index surged more than 3% on July 2 after four consecutive sessions of losses. Infosys rose about 3.9%, HCLTech about 3.4%, TCS about 2.6% and Tech Mahindra about 2.3%, with several IT names among the top Nifty gainers. The bounce followed the prior day's slump triggered by a KPIT Technologies revenue warning.
story.why_it_matters: The one-day swing from worst-performing to best-performing sector illustrates mean-reversion / bargain-buying dynamics after a sharp correction, and how single-stock news (a KPIT warning) can move a whole index for a day before sentiment resets.
story.investor_takeaway: A single day's sector bounce reflects short-term positioning, not a change in fundamentals; understanding why an index moved matters more than the move itself.
